meanings.definition: give a certain impression or have a certain outward aspect
examples: This appears to be a very difficult problem
They appeared like people who had not eaten or slept for a long time

meanings.definition: seem to be true, probable, or apparent
examples: It seems that he is very gifted
It appears that the weather in California is very bad
There seems no reason to go ahead with the project now

meanings.definition: appear to one's own mind or opinion
examples: I seem to be misunderstood by everyone
I can't seem to learn these Chinese characters

meanings.definition: appearing as such but not necessarily so
examples: for all his apparent wealth he had no money to pay the rent
the committee investigated some apparent discrepancies
the ostensible truth of their theories
